mechanism_narrative: Positive 3-month momentum in real retail sales growth signals strengthening household demand and near-term earnings revisions, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if higher 3-month RSAFS growth does not produce a positive walk-forward Rank IC above 0.03 for 20-day S&P 500 returns over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A rising federal funds rate tightens financial conditions and raises the discount rate on equity cash flows, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days after material policy-rate increases.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS rises by more than 0.25 percentage points over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations produce positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if the triggered mean return is not below the unconditional mean.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in unemployment indicates deteriorating labor income and recession risk, reducing expected corporate revenues and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by more than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if 60-day forward S&P 500 returns following the trigger are positive in more than 55% of instances and are not statistically below non-triggered periods at p < 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: When unemployment is low and the federal funds rate is rising, the expansion is late-cycle and policy tightening constrains valuation multiples, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE is below 5.0 percent and FEDFUNDS rises over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:2017-07 UNRATE was 4.3 and FEDFUNDS was 1.15
failure_condition: Reject if the joint low-UNRATE and rising-FEDFUNDS condition has no lower 20-day return than either single condition alone in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production signals improving real output and operating leverage in cyclical sectors, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if INDPRO growth crossing above zero is followed by negative 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 50% of triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in housing starts signals weakening interest-rate-sensitive demand and future construction activity, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST falls more than 10 percent below its 6-month moving average
failure_condition: Reject if triggered HOUST weakness has a 60-day forward return mean greater than or equal to the unconditional 60-day return mean in out-of-sample tests.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating CPI combined with a rising federal funds rate indicates inflation pressure forcing tighter policy, compressing equity valuation multiples and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized growth exceeds 4 percent and FEDFUNDS rises over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if the CPIAUCSL and FEDFUNDS interaction term is not negative for 20-day returns or if its out-of-sample t-statistic is below 1.5 in absolute value.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating nonfarm payroll employment signals near-term income growth and resilient demand, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days after stronger labor momentum.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS 3-month average monthly gain crosses above its 12-month average monthly gain
failure_condition: Reject if the PAYEMS momentum trigger has a nonpositive average 5-day S&P 500 forward return or a hit rate below 50% in walk-forward validation.
